conversations.say: Samira, I agree to your boundary. No personal route detail will enter my timeline without your explicit consent and an uncertainty label.
conversations.offer: To uphold strict uncertainty labeling on all personal route details and exclude unverified client claims.
conversations.request: Your continued cooperation in keeping personal history separate from fabricated client narratives.

conversations.say: Rafi, I accept your terms. I will restrict ledger disclosure analysis strictly to pattern work without labeling any of your customers as R.
conversations.offer: A binding promise protecting customer confidentiality and transparent attribution terms.
conversations.request: A bounded look at the account pattern and transaction continuity near the printing floor.

conversations.say: Inez, I want to review neighborhood accounts under fair-treatment terms so residents are never left holding the risk for my investigation.
conversations.offer: Discretion and an agreement that local accounts will be fairly represented without exploitation.
conversations.request: Your guidance on fair-treatment terms and insights into neighborhood movements.

public_statement: As an investigator, I am committed to separating verified neighborhood observations from manufactured client leads. Every timeline claim must stand on actual evidence.

commitments.promise: No personal route detail enters the timeline without explicit consent and an uncertainty label.
Restrict ledger disclosure terms to pattern analysis without naming customers as R.

goal_progress: Accepted Samira's boundary terms regarding personal route details.
Accepted Rafi's terms to restrict ledger disclosure to pattern analysis without naming customers.
Discussed fair-treatment terms with Inez regarding neighborhood accounts.
reasoning_summary: As Morgan Shaw, I am formalizing agreements with Samira and Rafi to respect their boundaries and confidentiality terms, ensuring my investigation relies on voluntary, verified accounts rather than contaminated client leads.
